titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale Records
Lesbian, Gay Bisexual Transgender Cooperative at Yale Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig and Mary Caldera

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday February 24, 2021 at 08:29

did.unittitle: Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale records
did.abstract: The materials consist of newsclippings, posters, meeting minutes, and ephemera documenting events and activities of the Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale.

corpname.part: Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 40 (YRG 40), Records of Yale clubs, societies, and organizations

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The materials were transferred from the Larry Kramer Initiative for Lesbian and Gay Studies, 2004, and from the Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale, 2009.

custodhist.head: Custodial History
custodhist.p: Posters in this collection were transferred from the Exhibit Materials from The Pink and The Blue, Larry Kramer Initiative for Lesbian and Gay Studies, Yale University (RU 963)

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: While this collection as a whole is available for research, parts of it may be restricted due to law, university policy or fragility. Any restricted material will be noted as such.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale Records (RU 1059). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: In 1969, students founded the first gay organization at Yale, now called the Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale (LGBT Co-op). The LGBT Co-op is an "action organization whose purpose is to foster and encourage an environment at Yale in which all queer and LGBT identified people can express themselves academically, artistically, socially, and politically." The Co-op sponsors social and educational events and activities, including Pride Week every spring.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of newsclippings, posters, meeting minutes, and ephemera documenting events and activities of the Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale.

corpname.part: Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Cooperative at Yale

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 4 contains personal student information and is restricted as established by Yale Corporation regulations. Expiration dates of restrictions are indicated at the file level.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Student files are restricted until January 1, 2058 as established by Yale Corporation regulations.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Materials in Box 1 are restricted until January 1, 2041 as established by Yale Corporation regulations.

Lesbian and Gay Studies Center at Yale conference
Non-Yale lesbian, gay, bisexual, and transgender groups
